g.text: Please use CSS style instead of skinparam ParticipantPadding
create(initiator, target, channel, grant, pre, post)
When multiple slots conflict, all arrival slots placed before any departure adjustments
Alternative: Surge in Arrival Requests Exceeding Capacity
Capacity per resource = 1; dynamic adjustment maintains arrival priority; additional requests requeued
If grant = Write and initiator is not resource owner => operation blocked; else re-queued
FAIL (no requests or invalid time window)
Attempt to allocate >1 operation per resource triggers 409 Conflict
Edge Case: Safety - Conflicting Grants on Same Resource
If another operation with Write/Admin on same resource from different initiator => 409 Conflict
